markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore Roadway's attribution platform capabilities and potential partnership with GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Roadway offers a customizable, end-to-end attribution solution for B2B SaaS companies, starting at $5,000/month for clients (discounted to $3,000 for agency partners)](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [The platform provides granular campaign-level insights, multi-touch attribution, and AI-powered analysis to optimize marketing spend and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Roadway is seeking agency partnerships to expand its reach, offering a 25% commission and the ability to bundle services](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)

## Topics

### Roadway Platform Overview

  - [Centralized attribution management hub for parsing sessions and applying custom rules](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Connects various data sources (e.g., CRM, analytics tools) to provide a holistic view of the customer journey](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Offers flexible attribution models (first-touch, multi-touch, last-touch) with customizable rules and weights](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Provides campaign-level insights on revenue metrics, including real ROAS calculations](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)

### Technical Capabilities

  - [Uses a pixel for website tracking and integrates with ad platforms for spend data](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Allows for CRM overrides to include offline touchpoints and custom events](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Offers retroactive attribution updates when new rules or sources are added](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Provides a semantic layer for easy dashboard creation and analysis](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)

### AI-Powered Analysis

  - ["Growth marketing coworker" feature automatically analyzes trends and surfaces insights](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Ability to create custom "coworkers" focused on specific areas (e.g., SEO) or metrics](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Generates action reports for each metric, considering full-funnel impact and validation metrics](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)

### Agency Partnership Model

  - [Roadway offers a 25% discount to agency clients and a 25% commission to the agency](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [Agencies can add service margins on top of the Roadway subscription](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Roadway provides support in client onboarding, including attribution mapping and dashboard setup](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)

### Implementation Process

  - [Client connects data sources through OAuth or API keys](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [Roadway team validates data and conducts a kickoff call to understand attribution needs](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Custom workspace with tailored dashboards delivered within 3 days](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Ongoing support for tweaks and optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to explore the Roadway platform using the provided test drive link](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
  - [Tim to send additional information about the agency partner program via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
  - [Jason to consider potential clients for a proof of concept implementation](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=1876.0)
  - [Both parties to set up a Slack channel for ongoing communication and questions](https://fathom.video/share/JqoWypAiYqVZKJz6EJj6dzGP-EVHZHBf?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)
